commit.message:
Deploy: 更新博客内容 2026-04-10 21:53:07

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(auth): add Express middleware for JWT auth, disable Wonderwall autoLogin

Replace Wonderwall autoLogin with Express-level JWT middleware to allow
M2M traffic from KISS while enforcing auth on all other routes.

Middleware behavior:
- Health checks (/api/isalive, /api/isready): pass through
- M2M routes (/api/v1/*): pass through (own introspection-based auth)
- Valid user JWT: pass through (validates signature, issuer, audience, expiry)
- App tokens (idtyp=app): rejected on non-M2M routes (defense-in-depth)
- Browser requests without token: redirect to /oauth2/login
- API requests without token: 401 Unauthorized
- Development without NAIS cluster: pass through

NAIS config: autoLogin: true → false

121 new tests: 23 middleware unit tests + 98 per-endpoint enforcement tests.
Reviewed by GPT 5.4, Codex, Sonnet, and Opus (2 rounds).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Harden CI gates and AI reliability

Restore Python coverage gate to 70%, expand AI-service test coverage to 78%, fix evaluator CLI output generation, broaden CI smoke tests, and stabilize Playwright CI runtime path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Add Docker Compose configurations and improve tenant logging

- Add docker-compose.local.yml for local development with PostgreSQL + pgAdmin
- Add docker-compose.prod.yml for production with external database
- Improve Dockerfile: Use Alpine base, better MongoDB installation
- Enhance TenantController logging for better debugging
- Add improved error messages in API responses
- All containers start successfully and API endpoints respond correctly

Local setup verification:
✅ Health endpoint: /api/health
✅ Login endpoint: /api/central/login
✅ Create tenant: /api/tenants (POST)
✅ List tenants: /api/tenants (GET)

Known issues to fix in next PR:
- Tenant migrations not running automatically (relations not created)
- Need to debug seeding process

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Add Ollama AI provider support (v1.21.7)

- New addon config: ai_provider, ollama_url, ollama_model
- Add AI_PROVIDER/OLLAMA_URL/OLLAMA_MODEL globals to main.py
- Add _call_ollama() function; _call_gemini_json() routes to it when AI_PROVIDER=ollama
- ingress_server: _setup_ai_globals(), _has_ai(), _ai_not_configured_response() helpers
- All handlers (optimize/sort/date/group/discover/add) use _has_ai() and _setup_ai_globals()

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: resolve 13 security vulnerabilities across all tools

Critical:
- Replace pickle.loads() with JSON serialization in embed.py (arbitrary code exec)
- Set config file permissions to 0o600 and prefer env vars for API keys

High:
- Fix SQL injection: parameterized queries in query-session.py
- Fix TOCTOU race condition: atomic lock creation in watch-sessions.py
- Fix path traversal: validate WSL paths in sync-knowledge.py

Medium:
- FTS5 query injection: sanitize special chars/operators (query-session.py, briefing.py)
- Silent error handling: add stderr logging to ~23 bare except blocks
- Input validation: length limits for titles, content, and filters
- Whitelist validation for f-string DDL in migrations
- Database integrity check (PRAGMA quick_check) on open
- Backup verification with SHA-256 checksums

Added:
- test_security.py: 9 security verification tests
- SECURITY.md: security policy and best practices

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct rollback status and batch search schema conformance

- pkg/mover/rollback.go: buildRollbackSummary default case now returns
  'completed' instead of empty string, preventing successful Rollback
  calls from producing result.Status = ''
- wails-app/backend/app.go: persistBatchSearchResult now sets
  SearchStatus to 'searched_not_found' or 'search_error' for new video
  records on failed source-specific searches, instead of leaving the
  NewVideo default 'success' which is not a valid Python schema value
- wails-app/backend/app_test.go: update test assertion to expect the
  correct 'searched_not_found' status for not-found results

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Defer eviction commit until after fee-balance validation

Previously, check_and_collect_evictions results were immediately applied
(removing victims from by_hash/seen/account_states) before fee-balance
validation. If the candidate was later rejected for insufficient balance,
the evicted txs were permanently lost from the queue.

Fix: collect evictions speculatively but defer removal until after all
validation passes. Queue-size checks account for pending evictions via
effective_len. Matches stellar-core's tryAdd which only calls
evictTransactions after canAdd succeeds.

Closes #1188

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore(*): re-enable markdownlint MD060 (#651)

`markdownlint`'s `MD060` rule was being bypassed in root scripts and
`lint-staged`, so table formatting issues could slip through locally and
in pre-commit flows. This change removes those exceptions and brings the
affected Markdown tables into rule-compliant formatting.

- **Lint configuration**
- Removed `--disable MD060` from the root Markdown lint/fix scripts in
`package.json`
- Removed `--disable MD060` from the Markdown task in
`lint-staged.config.mjs`

- **Markdown formatting updates**
- Reformatted affected blog post tables to use consistent pipe spacing
required by `MD060`
- Normalized delimiter rows and empty cells where the prior
compact/tight mix was invalid

- **Affected content**
-
`apps/blog/src/posts/docs/difference-between-b-i-tag-and-strong-em-tag.md`
-
`apps/blog/src/posts/docs/difference-between-console-log-and-console-dir.md`
  - `apps/blog/src/posts/docs/korean-unicode.md`

- **Example**
  ```md
  - :---:|:---:|:---:
  ```

commit.message:
test(use-cases): Phase 5 — use case unit tests with mock repositories

R-17: Add unit tests for all 4 domain use cases using Swift Testing (@Test).

DetectFacesUseCaseTests  (5 tests)
  - Verifies delegation and that coordinates are not transformed at the
    use-case boundary (Vision flip belongs in FaceDetectionService).

RenderMaskUseCaseTests   (4 tests)
  - Verifies all rendering parameters (faces, intensity, sizeMultiplier,
    solidCleanColor) are forwarded to the repository unchanged.

SaveToPhotosUseCaseTests (4 tests)
  - Verifies PhotoLibraryError.unauthorized propagation and generic error
    pass-through.

ProcessExportUseCaseTests (5 tests)
  - Verifies ExportSettings fields are forwarded unchanged.
  - Compile-time contract test confirms execute() is non-throwing by design.

All mocks are local private types; capturing mocks use final class for
safe mutation without mutating protocol requirements.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Sync TransactionSet.transactions with generalized_tx_set after trimming

Reconstruct the flat transactions vector from the trimmed phase
contents instead of using the pre-trim selection. Previously, trim-
invalid transactions could remain in the flat vector while absent
from the generalized tx set, causing compare_tx_sets() to use
inflated op-count and fee metrics for local candidates.

Fixes #1184

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: henyey
repository.description: A pure Rust implementation of Stellar Core

commit.message:
Exclude replaced tx from capacity check in replace-by-fee

When the tx queue is at max_queue_ops capacity, fee-bump replacement
would fail because check_and_collect_evictions didn't discount the
to-be-replaced tx's ops from the surge pricing queue. stellar-core's
TxQueueLimiter subtracts the old tx's resources before calling
canFitWithEviction.

Fix: pre-insert the replaced tx's hash into the pending_evictions
exclude set so collect_evictions_for_lane_config skips it when building
the surge pricing queue.

Closes #1187

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Remove domain restriction from central API routes

Problem:
- Central API routes were restricted to specific domains using Route::domain()
- In production (Render), the domain lookup was complex and routes weren't matching
- This caused CORS preflight (OPTIONS) to fail with 404
- Frontend couldn't reach /api/central/login or /api/tenants endpoints

Solution:
- Removed Route::domain() wrapper from central routes
- Routes are now available on all domains, security is handled by middleware:
  - CentralAdminAuth middleware validates tokens for protected routes
  - Throttle middleware protects login endpoint

Benefits:
- Simpler routing that works in all environments (local, Render, etc.)
- No more domain resolution issues
- CORS preflight requests now return 204 with proper headers
- Frontend can successfully authenticate and fetch tenant data

Affected routes:
- POST /api/central/login
- GET|POST /api/tenants (protected by central.admin middleware)
- GET|DELETE /api/tenants/{id} (protected by central.admin middleware)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace hardcoded Discord client ID 1342618997321564344 (JustTheTip)

commit.message:
fix: revert API ingress to INGRESS_TRAFFIC_INTERNAL_ONLY

Now that the UI Cloud Run service has Direct VPC Egress (ALL_TRAFFIC)
configured, its outbound requests to the API are routed through the
project VPC and treated as internal traffic by Cloud Run.

External callers receive 404 without invoking the container.
IAM auth (osrs-ui-sa roles/run.invoker) remains as a second layer.

IMPORTANT: only merge/deploy this AFTER the UI infra deploy that adds
vpc_access has completed successfully, otherwise API calls will 404 again.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: comprehensive QA audit — 80+ test cases across 5 domains

QA Audit Test Suite:
- test_qa_hardware.py: VRAM thresholds, 95% usage offloading, probe fallback
  chain, cache TTL, inference mode boundaries (20 tests)
- test_qa_context_manager.py: Infinite compaction loop prevention, context
  drift, summary preservation, edge cases (16 tests)
- test_qa_security.py: Prompt injection (rm -rf, fork bomb, encoded bypass),
  SSH safety gates, path traversal, ConfirmingTool, process isolation (35 tests)
- test_qa_indexing.py: tree-sitter symbol extraction, cross-module dependencies,
  git diff/conflict handling, RAG chunking, ProjectMap model (18 tests)
- test_qa_e2e.py: Full agent workflow (index→find bug→fix→verify),
  plan parsing, tool loop detection, web tools, HTML sanitization (17 tests)

commit.message:
Remove customTopics from all CognitiveServices API versions (backfill) (#42012)

* Remove customTopics property, CustomTopicConfig, and RaiTopicConfig from all CognitiveServices API versions

Backfill removal of the customTopics property from RaiPolicyProperties,
along with CustomTopicConfig and RaiTopicConfig model definitions,
across all API versions since their introduction in 2025-07-01-preview.

Pre-TypeSpec versions (direct swagger JSON edit):
- 2025-07-01-preview
- 2025-09-01

Post-TypeSpec versions (@removed decorator + recompile):
- 2025-10-01-preview
- 2025-12-01
- 2026-01-15-preview

No example files reference these types — no example updates needed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Include 2026-03-01 stable in customTopics removal backfill

Recompile 2026-03-01 swagger from TypeSpec with existing @removed(v2025_10_01_preview)
decorator to remove customTopics property, CustomTopicConfig, and RaiTopicConfig
definitions — consistent with all other post-TypeSpec versions in this PR.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor(design-system): Phase 4 — color token consolidation + component split

R-13: Disable ASSETCATALOG_COMPILER_GENERATE_SWIFT_ASSET_SYMBOL_EXTENSIONS.
      Add explicit Color.appPrimary, appBackground, appSurface static lets
      to Colors.swift with asset catalog documentation comments.
      Colors.swift is now the single source of truth for all color tokens.

R-14: Split CardView.swift (126 lines) into focused files:
      ToggleCardRow.swift — ToggleCardRow settings row component.
      Toast.swift         — ToastView, ToastModifier, appToast View extension.
      CardView.swift keeps only AppCard + SectionCard + preview.
      GlassmorphismToolbar.swift cleaned of toast types.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
